source.pdf: official_books/Nimble 5e TTRPG Heroes Core Book -- Evan Diaz -- 41845a084350bb7daa48eb313815b1f9 -- Anna’s Archive.pdf

class.name: Hunter
class.description: Respect the forest and her children, and she will bestow upon you many gifts. Hunters are relentless trackers and masters of the wild.

progression.name: Hunter's Mark
progression.description: Action: Mark a visible quarry for 1 day; it cannot be hidden from you and attacks gain advantage or +LVL damage.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

progression.name: Forager
progression.description: Gain advantage on checks to find food and water in the wild.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Thrill of the Hunt
progression.description: Choose 2 Thrill of the Hunt abilities.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Roll & Strike
progression.description: Action: If you have no TotH charges, move up to speed toward your quarry and attack for free if adjacent.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

progression.name: Remember the Wild
progression.description: During wilderness Safe Rest, you may choose different Hunter options available to you.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Choose a Hunter subclass.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Tracker's Intuition
progression.description: Discern details of prior encounters from tracks and environmental clues.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Thrill of the Hunt (2)
progression.description: Choose a 3rd Thrill of the Hunt ability.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 DEX or WIL.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Explorer of the Wilds
progression.description: +2 speed and gain a climbing speed.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this for positioning: engage priority targets, escape danger, or set up advantage before attacking.

progression.name: Hunter's Resolve
progression.description: When you have no TotH charges, treat all creatures as quarry for movement and melee attacks until end of turn.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

progression.name: Final Takedown
progression.description: Action: Spend 1 TotH charge to crit a melee attack against Bloodied quarry and double Hunter's Mark damage.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or INT.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Versatile Bowmaster
progression.description: Longbow may roll 2d4 instead of 1d8; Crossbow may roll 2d8 instead of 4d4.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Thrill of the Hunt (3)
progression.description: Choose a 4th Thrill of the Hunt ability.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Gain your Hunter subclass feature.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Thrill of the Hunt (4)
progression.description: Choose a 5th Thrill of the Hunt ability.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 DEX or WIL.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: No Escape
progression.description: When allies make opportunity attacks you may make a ranged opportunity attack against same target.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or INT.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Veteran Stalker
progression.description: Gain a TotH charge when first Bloodied in an encounter and for every Wound gained.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

progression.name: Keen Eye, Steady Hand
progression.description: Add WIL to ranged weapon damage.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Gain your Hunter subclass feature.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Thrill of the Hunt (5)
progression.description: Choose a 6th Thrill of the Hunt ability.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 DEX or WIL.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Keen Sight
progression.description: Advantage on Perception checks.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or INT.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Thrill of the Hunt (6)
progression.description: Choose a 7th Thrill of the Hunt ability.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Gain your Hunter subclass feature.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 DEX or WIL.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Peerless Hunter
progression.description: You can Defend against your quarry for free.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or INT.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Wild Endurance
progression.description: Gain 1 Thrill of the Hunt charge at start of your turns.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Epic Boon
progression.description: Choose an Epic Boon (see pg. 23 of the GM's Guide).
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Nemesis
progression.description: +1 to any 2 stats. Hunter's Mark can target any number of creatures simultaneously.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Ambusher
progression.description: On initiative, may use Hunter's Mark for free; gain advantage on first attack each encounter.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Skilled Tracker
progression.description: Advantage on checks to track creatures.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Skilled Navigator
progression.description: Cannot become lost by nonmagical means.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Primal Predator
progression.description: (1/encounter) Weapon attacks ignore cover and armor this turn.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss. Budget around its 1/ENCOUNTER limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

progression.name: Pack Hunter
progression.description: Whenever you mark a creature, may also mark another within 6 spaces for free.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Apex Predator
progression.description: Use Primal Predator twice per encounter; gain 1 TotH charge on initiative.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Impressive Form
progression.description: +5 max HP. Upgrade Hit Dice to d10s.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this to stabilize momentum mid-fight, ideally before allies are forced into defensive turns.

progression.name: I Have the High Ground
progression.description: On initiative or when gaining TotH charges, move up to half speed for free ignoring difficult terrain.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

progression.name: Resourceful Herbalist
progression.description: During suitable Safe Rest, craft Healing Salves equal to WIL.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this to stabilize momentum mid-fight, ideally before allies are forced into defensive turns.

progression.name: Healing Salve
progression.description: Action: Heal self or adjacent creature WIL d6 HP; salves expire on Safe Rest.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

progression.name: Ha! I'm Over Here!
progression.description: (1/Safe Rest) If an attack would drop you to 0 HP, move away up to speed and take no damage.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this for positioning: engage priority targets, escape danger, or set up advantage before attacking. Budget around its 1/SAFE REST limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

progression.name: Unparalleled Survivalist
progression.description: Gain +WIL armor. When attacking with ranged weapon, may first move half speed for free.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

choiceOptions.name: Addling Arrow
choiceOptions.description: Action: Ranged attack; target's next attack must target nearest other creature at random.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Come Get Some!
choiceOptions.description: Action: Attack a target; it is Taunted by you until end of its next turn.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Decoy
choiceOptions.description: When you Defend: attack misses instead and you may move up to half speed away.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

choiceOptions.name: Fleet Feet
choiceOptions.description: Move up to your speed for free, ignoring difficult terrain.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Use this for positioning: engage priority targets, escape danger, or set up advantage before attacking.

choiceOptions.name: Grease Trap
choiceOptions.description: (1/encounter) Reaction when enemy moves adjacent to you/ally within 6: target falls prone and gains fire vulnerability.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value. Budget around its 1/ENCOUNTER limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

choiceOptions.name: Hail of Arrows
choiceOptions.description: (Half range) 2 actions: shoot all creatures in 3x3 area; speed halved until end of next turn.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Heavy Shot
choiceOptions.description: (Half range) Action: ranged attack and push target by size.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Incendiary Shot
choiceOptions.description: (Half range) Action: ranged attack; add WIL d8 fire damage.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Multishot
choiceOptions.description: (Half range) Action: attack quarry; second target within 2 spaces takes same damage.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Pinning Shot
choiceOptions.description: Spend 3 actions shooting quarry; it is Restrained until escape (DC 10+WIL).
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Snare Trap
choiceOptions.description: (1/encounter) Reaction when enemy moves adjacent to you/ally within 6: move back 1 and Restrained (DC 10+WIL).
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value. Budget around its 1/ENCOUNTER limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

choiceOptions.name: Sharpshooter
choiceOptions.description: Action: if unmoved this turn and quarry is 4+ spaces away, attack for double damage.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Vital Shot
choiceOptions.description: (Half range) Action: against Hampered quarry ranged attacks ignore armor; if unarmored, double Hunter's Mark bonus damage.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Wild Instinct
choiceOptions.description: (1/round) If you have no TotH charges, assess for free with advantage.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value. Budget around its 1/ROUND limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

choiceOptions.name: Ambusher
choiceOptions.description: On initiative, may use Hunter's Mark for free; gain advantage on first attack each encounter.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 3. Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceOptions.name: Skilled Tracker
choiceOptions.description: Advantage on checks to track creatures.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 3. Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceOptions.name: Skilled Navigator
choiceOptions.description: Cannot become lost by nonmagical means.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 3. Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceOptions.name: Primal Predator
choiceOptions.description: (1/encounter) Weapon attacks ignore cover and armor this turn.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 7. Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss. Budget around its 1/ENCOUNTER limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

choiceOptions.name: Pack Hunter
choiceOptions.description: Whenever you mark a creature, may also mark another within 6 spaces for free.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 11. Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceOptions.description: Use Primal Predator twice per encounter; gain 1 TotH charge on initiative.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 15. Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.
